Name: Average time from Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR to Request Payment
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Total time between Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION and Request Payment in variants that include Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Minimum time it takes Request Payment to be done after Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in cases that previously experienced a Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Average time for Request Payment grouped by case:BudgetNumber
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Request Payment' and the end of case grouped by the last value of case:BudgetNumber

Name: Total resolution time of Request Payment in successful variants (ending with Payment Handled) versus variants that include at least one rejection by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Request Payment' and activity 'Payment Handled'

Name: Time from Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE to Request Payment in variants without any rejection compared to variants with Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Average waiting time to the Request Payment after the last approval activity (Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR, Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER, or Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION)
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Minimum time between Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER and Request Payment in variants that avoid rejection by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Total time it takes Request Payment to be done after the first submission in cases that were rejected by PRE_APPROVER at least once
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Elapsed time between Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR and Request Payment for domestic declarations (inferred from absence of pre-approval steps) versus those requiring full approval chain
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Average time to Request Payment since Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE in variants that include Declaration APPROVED by PRE_APPROVER without subsequent rejection
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Time of Request Payment execution relative to the timestamp of Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR in high-frequency variants (e.g., top 3 most common variants)
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Total time from the last rejection event (e.g., Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER) to Request Payment in re-submitted cases
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Minimum time for Request Payment when preceded directly by Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR versus when preceded by additional approval steps
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR' and activity 'Request Payment'

Name: Average time between Request Payment and Payment Handled in cases that originated from a variant containing Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Request Payment' and activity 'Payment Handled'
